title: 350ml Dry Flowers Double Walled Glass Mugs with Handle, Flower Mug Tea Cup for Hot and Cold Drinks, Birthday Gifts for Women Mum Friends Teacher Valentines Mothers Day
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: Elevate Your Sipping Experience:This 350ml dried flowers double walled glass mugs is made of high borosilicate glass, a special material that makes the cup light and wrist friendly. The handle provides a comfortable grip, preventing slipping,making every sip feel like a little luxury. Whether you’re sipping morning tea or an evening juice, it’s built to last and impress.

Double Wall Design:The flower double walled glass tea mug design effectively insulates heat, keeping your drinks at the right temperature while protecting your hands from scalding.Hot drinks stay toasty, iced drinks stay chilled. It’s practical brilliance wrapped in a gorgeous, heat - shielded package.When not in use, please invert to avoid the layered petals sinking due to gravity.

Wonderful Gift :The unique double-layer flower design perfectly combines practicality and aesthetics. Not only can be used as a creative item, but also as a decorative item.The dried flower mug is a reliable and fashionable choice for daily use and gift giving.

Wide Use:The double walled flower tea cup can be used to make tea, contain drinking water, tea, juice, coffee and other types of drinks, to meet the daily drinking water needs.Also, its transparent double layer with flowers decorates your space, adding an aesthetic touch to your home, office, or leisure areas.

Live the Refined Life:This floral mug isn’t just about drinking-it’s about elevating your day. It suits literary enthusiasts loving artistic items to adorn desks or tea tables. For office workers, placing it on the desk not only serves for drinking during work breaks but also beautifies the workspace, relieving work stress.
